tasks_completed: Wire surge pricing into gateway (_gateway_credits + buy_and_call)
learnings: PaymentsMCP already registers a /health route via oauth_router (returns generic {status,service,timestamp}). To add custom /health, manipulate mcp._manager._fastapi_app.router.routes after mcp.start() — remove existing /health then add_api_route. Or insert before it using route list manipulation.
mcp._manager._fastapi_app is the FastAPI app instance, available after mcp.start() returns
tests at 0 call volume still pass after surge pricing because get_current_price returns base_price at low volume
